productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Purple Top
description: Composition Purple sleeveless tunic top made of flowy fabric in 100% polyester, has rosette detailing from the left shoulder to the right hem and an assymetrical, flowing hemline Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Do not bleach Steam iron You'll look all dressed up when you go out in this tunic top from scullers for her. The assymetric side hems of this top and the satin lining that is just barely visible through the billowy shell give a feminine feeling. Team this with leggings and silver stilettoes for an easy breezy look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
